ns0:entry.ns0:title: ChiR24/Unreal_mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ChiR24/Unreal_mcp
Language: c++
A comprehensive Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI assistants to control Unreal Engine through the native C++ Automation Bridge plugin. Built with TypeScript and C++.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ClickHouse/ClickHouse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse
Language: c++
ClickHouse® is a real-time analytics database management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MrNeRF/LichtFeld-Studio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MrNeRF/LichtFeld-Studio
Language: c++
Train, inspect, edit, automate, and export 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes from a single native application.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WasmEdge/WasmEdge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge
Language: c++
WasmEdge is a lightweight, high-performance, and extensible WebAssembly runtime for cloud native, edge, and decentralized applications. It powers serverless apps, embedded functions, microservices, smart contracts, and IoT devices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abseil/abseil-cpp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abseil/abseil-cpp
Language: c++
Abseil Common Libraries (C++)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/arrow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/arrow
Language: c++
Apache Arrow is the universal columnar format and multi-language toolbox for fast data interchange and in-memory analytics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: argotorg/solidity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/argotorg/solidity
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: barry-ran/QtScrcpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/barry-ran/QtScrcpy
Language: c++
Android real-time display control software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: catchorg/Catch2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2
Language: c++
A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/doxygen/doxygen
Language: c++
Official doxygen git repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: project-chip/connectedhomeip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/project-chip/connectedhomeip
Language: c++
Matter (formerly Project CHIP) creates more connections between more objects, simplifying development for manufacturers and increasing compatibility for consumers, guided by the Connectivity Standards Alliance.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tensorflow/tflite-micro

Infrastructure to enable deployment of ML models to low-power resource-constrained embedded targets (including microcontrollers and digital signal processors).
